title: Contact the Labour Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact the Labour Program
Note: To report a serious injury, death or refusal to work, call the Labour Program toll-free at 1-800-641-4049 (emergency services 24 hours).
If you have questions about federally regulated employment standards, health and safety, workplace equality, employment equity, or workers' compensation that are not answered on our website:
- Contact the nearest regional office of the Labour Program by telephone or mail. You can also send us an email using our online form by choosing one of the following topics: Employer's annual occurrence reports - contact form Employment equity - contact form Employment standards - contact form Federal mediation and conciliation service - contact form Federal    Workers' Compensation Service Harassment and Violence Prevention - contact form Health and safety - contact form Labour Funding program - contact form Workplace information division
- Employer's annual occurrence reports - contact form
- Employment equity - contact form
- Employment standards - contact form
- Federal mediation and conciliation service - contact form
- Federal    Workers' Compensation Service
- Harassment and Violence Prevention - contact form
- Health and safety - contact form
- Labour Funding program - contact form
- Workplace information division
Please call 1-800-641-4049 for enquiries.

#### North West Pacific Region (Alberta, British Columbia & Territories)
ESDC - Labour Program 270 - 220 4th Avenue SE Calgary, AB  T2G 4X3
ESDC - Labour Program 1440 - 9700 Jasper Avenue Edmonton, AB  T5J 4C1
Vancouver & Territories
ESDC - Labour Program 1100-300 West Georgia Street Vancouver, BC  V6B 6B4

#### Central Region (Manitoba & Saskatchewan)
ESDC - Labour Program P.O. Box 4600 Winnipeg, MB  R3C 0S1
ESDC - Labour Program 4900 Yonge Street, 8th Floor North York, ON  M2N 6A8
ESDC - Labour Program 200 René-Lévesque Boulevard West East Tower, 6th Floor Montreal, QC  H2Z 1X4

#### Atlantic Region (New Brunswick, Newfoundland and Labrador, Nova Scotia & Prince Edward Island)
ESDC - Labour Program P.O. Box 5003 Moncton, NB  E1C 8R5

## Labour/employment standards
The Filing a complaint web page offers information on how to submit the following complaints:
- Monetary complaints For unpaid wages, or other amounts owed
- For unpaid wages, or other amounts owed
- Non-monetary complaints
- Unjust dismissal complaints, and
- Genetic testing complaints

## Occupational Health and safety reports

### Hazardous Occurrence Investigation Report (HOIR)
To record and report a workplace hazardous occurrence, consult:
- Hazardous occurrence investigation recording and reporting
Submit your completed HOIR to the Labour Program by:
Login - Data Gateway - Canada.ca
Email to the office closest to your workplace:

#### Atlantic Region (New Brunswick, Newfoundland and Labrador, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island)
atl-lab-tra-gd@labour-travail.gc.ca

#### Central Region (Manitoba, Saskatchewan)
cr-lab-tra-hoir-rescr-gd@labour-travail.gc.ca

#### North West Pacific Regions and North Territories (Alberta, British Columbia, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, Yukon)
na-nwpr-ohs-sst-ls-nt-gd@labour-travail.gc.ca
on-lab-tra-hoir_rescr-gd@labour-travail.gc.ca
qc-travail-labour-gd@labour-travail.gc.ca
Consult Employer’s health and safety annual reports for information on how to submit the following annual reports:
- Employer’s Annual Hazardous Occurrence Report (EAHOR) - Regular
- Employer’s Annual Hazardous Occurrence Report (EAHOR) - Onboard
- Employer’s Annual Harassment and Violence Occurrence Report (EAHVOR)
- Work Place Committee Report (WPCR)

## Additional contact information

### Employment standards, health and safety, and employment equity
Toll-free number : 1-800-641-4049

#### Federal Workers' Compensation Service
Contact your local workers' compensation office .

#### Collective bargaining information and analysis
(wages, benefits, working conditions, strikes and lockouts, innovative workplace practices, union membership, labour organizations and more):
Toll-free number : 1-877-259-8828

## Wage Earner Protection Program
The Wage Earner Protection Program offers services online for:
- trustees or receivers
You can also contact the Wage Earner Protection Program .
Contact us for media enquiries or to set up an interview.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
